scripts.build: npm run build -w @repo/lib && npm run build -w @repo/api && npm run build -w @repo/workers && npm run build -w @repo/infra-cdk
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @repo/lib && npm run dev -w @repo/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @repo/lib && tsc --noEmit -p api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p workers/tsconfig.json
